hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); exec('import py_compile; py_compile.compile(f, doraise=True); print(json.dumps({\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Python syntax OK: \"+f}}))') if f.endswith('.py') else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); r=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-m','ruff','check','--fix',f],capture_output=True,text=True) if f.endswith('.py') else None; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'ruff: '+((r.stdout.strip() or 'clean') if r else 'skipped')}})) if f.endswith('.py') else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); exts=('.jsx','.tsx','.ts','.js'); proc=subprocess.run(['npx','eslint','--fix','--no-error-on-unmatched-pattern',f],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd='frontend-v2') if any(f.endswith(e) for e in exts) and 'frontend-v2' in f else None; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'eslint: '+((proc.stdout.strip() or 'clean') if proc else 'skipped')}})) if proc is not None else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); f=f.replace('\\\\','/').replace('\\','/'); tests=None; tests='tests/unit/' if '/workflow/' in f and f.endswith('.py') else tests; tests='tests/unit/test_report_gen.py' if '/report_gen/' in f and f.endswith('.py') else tests; proc=subprocess.run(['python','-m','pytest',tests,'-x','-q','--tb=line','--no-header'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=30) if tests else None; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'auto-test: '+((proc.stdout.strip()[-200:] or 'pass') if proc else 'skipped')}})) if proc is not None else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); warn=''; exts=('.c','.h'); do_check=any(f.endswith(e) for e in exts); content=open(f,'r',encoding='utf-8',errors='ignore').read() if do_check and __import__('os').path.isfile(f) else ''; asil=re.search(r'@asil\s+(C|D)',content,re.IGNORECASE) if content else None; warn=f'WARNING: ASIL {asil.group(1)} file — reviewer approval required before modifying: {f}' if asil else ''; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','additionalContext':warn}})) if warn else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess,os; status=subprocess.run(['git','status','--porcelain'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout[:500]; diff_stat=subprocess.run(['git','diff','--stat'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout[:500]; os.makedirs('.codex_tmp',exist_ok=True); open('.codex_tmp/precompact_context.json','w').write(json.dumps({'git_status':status,'git_diff_stat':diff_stat},ensure_ascii=False)); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreCompact','additionalContext':'Preserved: git status + diff stat. Changed: '+status[:150]}}))" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"Preserve: task progress, file paths, error context, test results, MCP patterns"}}'
